name: part_010
file: tmp_hololive English -Promise- 2nd Anniversary Concert： Promise 2 You 【#Promise2U】 [9hMVpcDYS-0]_gemini-3-flash-preview/part_010.webm

scenes.description: Hakos Baelz and Ouro Kronii conclude their performance of "Daidaidaidaidaikirai".
Instrumental transition scene showcasing the futuristic city and stage architecture.

subtitles.original: …まんないわ
subtitles.english: ...not gonna stop

subtitles.original: いっそのこと切り放した方が楽なのだ
subtitles.english: It'd be easier just to cut ties altogether

subtitles.original: 大嫌いあなたのこと私だいだいだいだい大嫌い
subtitles.english: I hate you, I really, really, really, really hate you

subtitles.original: お前が情けないもはやバイバイバイバイバイしたい
subtitles.english: You're pathetic, I want to say bye-bye-bye-bye-bye already

subtitles.original: 脳内もう嘘吐き上に買い買い買い買い買わない
subtitles.english: My brain is full of lies, I'm not buying into it any-any-any-any-anymore

subtitles.original: どうだ？私のことあなただいだいだいだい大嫌い
subtitles.english: How's that? You really, really, really, really hate me too, don't you?

subtitles.original: ほらさ愛してやって一に流しな今に今にしからばなればでもにニコチなし
subtitles.english: Look, just love it and let it go, soon, soon, if that's the case, then no nicotine

subtitles.original: 愛して自画ついて結末はボミスボミスサンキューあめんきょし
subtitles.english: Love it, get stuck on your ego, the end is a mistake, mistake, thank you, no license

subtitles.original: 後味最悪だく無いわ！
subtitles.english: It's not like the aftertaste is the absolute worst!

subtitles.english: Yeah!

subtitles.original: I'm not into what you're wanting
subtitles.english: I'm not into what you're wanting

subtitles.original: I'm gonna express myself in this song
subtitles.english: I'm gonna express myself in this song

subtitles.original: H-A-L-F
subtitles.english: H-A-L-F

subtitles.original: 簡単な英語しかわかんない
subtitles.english: I only know simple English

subtitles.original: 踊るの大好き健康第一
subtitles.english: I love to dance, health comes first

subtitles.original: 憧れとコンプレックス大渋滞
subtitles.english: A heavy traffic jam of admiration and complexes

subtitles.original: 滑走でノリノリ滑走は飽き飽き
subtitles.english: Rolling on the runway, I'm tired of the runway

subtitles.original: 邪魔されてるいつもいつでも
subtitles.english: Being hindered always, at all times

subtitles.original: 恵まれているかどうかを
subtitles.english: Whether I'm blessed or not

subtitles.original: 楽しく過ごしていたい泣きたくないから
subtitles.english: I want to spend my time happily because I don't want to cry

subtitles.original: 問い質す神様がいなくても
subtitles.english: I'll keep questioning even if there's no God

subtitles.original: もうカッコつけていくしかないじゃん
subtitles.english: There's no choice but to keep acting cool

subtitles.original: そのままこのまま降り注ぐ光ね
subtitles.english: Just as it is, like this, the light pouring down

subtitles.original: 半分なんて思ったことないぜ
subtitles.english: I've never thought of it as just half

subtitles.original: そのままそのまま突き進む光
subtitles.english: Just as it is, pushing forward through the light

subtitles.original: 意地悪なんかじゃ止まんない
subtitles.english: Meanness won't stop me

subtitles.original: 笑わせたいのに上手にできない

subtitles.original: 誰かのせいにはしたくないよ
subtitles.english: I don't want to blame it on someone else

subtitles.original: 生まれてみたいから生まれてきただけ
subtitles.english: I was just born because I wanted to be born

subtitles.original: 新しい普通と幸せ
subtitles.english: A new normal and happiness

subtitles.original: そんなに遠くはないでしょう
subtitles.english: It's probably not that far away

subtitles.original: それでも今も誰かが撃ち放つ
subtitles.english: Still, even now, someone lets loose

subtitles.original: 悲しみと怒りのH-A-L-F

subtitles.english: There are days like that, too

subtitles.english: I absolutely can't miss it
